calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George McNitt appeared by zoom for Barbara Dickinson (petitioner).

Mr. McNitt stated that he has not heard of any other heirs in this matter and that he has nothing to add. The court stated that this is a court of equity, and that it does appear that the foster son was equitably adopted and received one third of the estate from the foster mother. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution is under submission with the court's intent to grant. Status on close of estate currently set for September 17, 2024, is continued to October 15, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at Mr. McNitt's request.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Continued To Aug-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George McNitt appeared by zoom for Barbara Dickinson (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Mr. McNitt's position that the other children of the foster mother should get the estate as the decedent died with no spouse, no issue and no parents. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution is continued to August 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. McNitt is to provide a brief on any legal authority to support his position. Said brief is to be filed by July 30, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
